title: pomaderris eriocephala
intro: Pomaderris eriocephala, also known as the 'Hill Pomaderris', is a shrub native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and infections. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Pomaderris eriocephala, such as teas and infusions, are often used to treat a range of ailments, and may be available at some herbal stores or online.
